additions.entry: event listener methods for memory interactions to IExecutionContextListener
ConfigDevice that represents the configured XML structure for a device
ConfigMemoryMapping that represents the configured XML structure for a memory mapping
IDevice interface to create memory devices
IMemoryMapping interface to create memory mapped devices
OutOfMemoryException that will be thrown if the host system has not enough memory

refactorings.entry: the instruction set DTD file to accommodate the new device structure

additions.entry: ExternalDeviceParser that will parse the XML structure of devices and their mappings
more XML tag and attribute constants to XmlConstants
MemoryBus that is orchestrating all the memory interactions
DeviceFactory to create and register IDevice and IMemoryMapping instances
